title: Beekeeping Pollinated
description: A mod that adds some honey related features to Minecraft
body:
Adds a variety of new foods and drinks, a new effect, new helmet, along with some blocks.
My first actually published mod. I will try to fix bugs if there are some and maybe add new versions.

##
![Drinking the yummy honey milk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88ab4c605a3a2c7f8027520f205b3f26493130fb.png)

_Drinking the **delicious** Honey Milk_
